name: black-box-on-policy-llm-distillation
description: Distill large LLMs into smaller models using only on-policy interactions, without access to internal model weights or gradients. Trigger: When optimizing LLMs for deployment without full model access
content:
## Black-Box On-Policy LLM Distillation

Distill large LLMs into smaller models using only on-policy interactions, without access to internal model weights or gradients.

### Core Concept

Policy-based distillation for LLM compression and optimization

### Key Techniques

This skill focuses on implementing approaches from research in agent reasoning, model optimization, and system scaling.

### Implementation

For implementation details, refer to the source paper at https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.10643

### Practical Guidance

- **When to use**: When optimizing LLMs for deployment without full model access
- **Integration**: Use with other agent skills for comprehensive systems
- **Scaling**: Consider performance trade-offs when applying at scale

### Reference

Paper: Black-Box On-Policy Distillation of Large Language Models
arXiv: https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.10643
